name: unified-feature-control-plane
intent: Merge the Platform Features tab and AI Chat Demo tab into a unified UI experience where users have a single control plane for feature development. Users should be able to chat with features, navigate through the skill cycle (discovery → analysis → classification → design → spec → implementation), and track the progress the system is making live.

indicators: UI integration - combining two existing pages
No external API calls - uses existing MCP/Wavesmith infrastructure
Local state management for feature sessions and chat
Real-time reactive updates using MST stores
